allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('./src/config/db'\); db.query\('ALTER TABLE usuarios ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS IsActive TINYINT\(1\) DEFAULT 1, ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS requiereCambioPassword TINYINT\(1\) DEFAULT 0'\).then\(\(\) => { console.log\('OK: columnas agregadas'\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('ERROR:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "try { require\('resend'\); console.log\('resend: OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('resend: NO INSTALADO -', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({ override: true }\); const app = require\('./src/app'\); const s = app.listen\(3099, \(\) => { console.log\('OK'\); s.close\(\); }\);")
